description: CompositionWhite synthetic leather shoes with violet stripes, mesh upper and rubber outsole with Adiwear heelWash care1. Remove dust with soft, clean, damp cloth2. Do not machine washEnjoy those long, healthy runs in these stylish white and purple striped basic running shoes from adidas. Designed for an all-round look and comfort feel, the rubber outsole adds that extra touch of stability, while the Adiwear heel made of highly durable rubber enhances shock absorbtion, keeping the feet safe from impact. The mesh upper provides ample ventilation for the feet, making this an ideal footwear for those who want that high performance comfort.
